# Password Reset

To reset a forgotten password, users should click the "Forgot password" link on the sign-in screen and provide their registered email address. A reset link, valid for one hour, will be sent to that email, allowing the user to set a new password. The new password must be at least ten characters long and include at least one number and one symbol.

[Source: account_management.md#password-reset]
